Bash(Autodesk Construction Cloud...". This adds a question_text column 
that extracts just the actual question/issue content:

- Add question_text column to schema
- Update parsers to store question_text when parsing RFIs/punch lists
- Update ranking to prioritize question_text for keyword matching
- Update search to fetch question_text from database
- Update test report display to show question_text instead of raw_text
- Add extract_questions.py script to backfill existing data

The question extraction strategies:
1. Look for "Question" section marker in RFI PDFs
2. Look for Q1:, Q2: numbered question markers
3. Look for lines ending with "?" 
4. Fall back to first substantive paragraph after metadata removal
